display.purpose: Landing hero and exceptional empty-state moments only.

headline.purpose: Login cards, major page headers, and top-level panel titles.

title.purpose: Card titles, dialog titles, release headings, and admin panel groups.

body.purpose: Markdown prose, release descriptions, daily briefs, and explanatory text.

label.purpose: Buttons, tabs, filters, form labels, and compact navigation.

mono.purpose: Dates, IDs, issue numbers, counters, status codes, and compact technical metadata.

shadows.name: primitive-low
shadows.purpose: Default controls, small cards, and tab rails.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Interactive release cards on hover only.

shadows.name: landing-panel
shadows.purpose: Large unauthenticated panels in light mode.

shadows.name: floating-layer
shadows.purpose: Dialogs, sheets, popovers, and account menus.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Buttons, header compaction, control bands, and ordinary state changes.

motion.name: quick-opacity
motion.purpose: Subtitle fade and small visibility changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default decisive action using the ink-on-paper contrast.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 12h14M13 6l6 6-6 6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>Sync now</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;height:36px;padding:8px 16px;border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:12px;background:oklch(0.18 0.02 70);color:oklch(0.985 0.01 95);font-family:'IBM Plex Sans SC',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;line-height:1.25;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,.08);transition:background-color .2s ease-out,box-shadow .2s ease-out}.ds-btn-primary svg{width:16px;height:16px}.ds-btn-primary:hover{background:oklch(0.18 0.02 70 / .9)}.ds-btn-primary:focus-visible{outline:none;border-color:oklch(0.7 0.05 240);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px oklch(0.7 0.05 240 / .5)}

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet action for filters, secondary login options, and utility controls.

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Transparent field with a warm border and clear focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field{display:grid;gap:6px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans SC',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif;color:oklch(0.18 0.02 70);font-size:14px;font-weight:500}.ds-input{height:36px;min-width:0;border:1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 95);border-radius:12px;background:transparent;color:oklch(0.18 0.02 70);padding:4px 12px;font-size:14px;font-weight:400;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,.05);transition:border-color .2s ease-out,box-shadow .2s ease-out}.ds-input::placeholder{color:oklch(0.45 0.03 70)}.ds-input:focus-visible{outline:none;border-color:oklch(0.7 0.05 240);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px oklch(0.7 0.05 240 / .5)}

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Default readable container for release cards, inbox panels, and admin groups.
components.html:
Release

v2.8.0 context window

Translation, polish, original links, and reaction controls stay close to the release identity.
components.css: .ds-card{max-width:420px;border:1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 95);border-radius:18px;background:oklch(0.995 0.008 95 / .8);color:oklch(0.18 0.02 70);padding:24px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans SC',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif;box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,.08);transition:box-shadow .2s ease-out}.ds-card:hover{box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(15,23,42,.1)}.ds-card-kicker{margin:0 0 8px;color:oklch(0.45 0.03 70);font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',ui-monospace,monospace;font-size:12px;font-weight:500}.ds-card h3{margin:0;color:oklch(0.18 0.02 70);font-size:18px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.25}.ds-card p:last-child{margin:12px 0 0;color:oklch(0.45 0.03 70);font-size:14px;line-height:1.7}

components.name: Tab Rail
components.description: Soft rail navigation where the active state returns to the page surface.
components.html: <nav class="ds-tabs" aria-label="Dashboard tabs"><button class="ds-tab ds-tab-active">全部</button><button class="ds-tab">发布</button><button class="ds-tab">日报</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-tabs{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;height:36px;border-radius:14px;background:oklch(0.965 0.01 95);padding:3px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans SC',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif;color:oklch(0.45 0.03 70)}.ds-tab{height:29px;border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:12px;background:transparent;color:oklch(0.18 0.02 70 / .6);padding:4px 10px;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;transition:color .2s ease-out,background-color .2s ease-out,box-shadow .2s ease-out}.ds-tab:hover{color:oklch(0.18 0.02 70)}.ds-tab-active{background:oklch(0.985 0.01 95);color:oklch(0.18 0.02 70);box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,.08)}.ds-tab:focus-visible{outline:none;border-color:oklch(0.7 0.05 240);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px oklch(0.7 0.05 240 / .5)}

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small pill for status, source labels, and compact metadata.

components.name: Theme Toggle
components.description: Compact segmented control for light, dark, and system preference.
components.css: .ds-theme-toggle{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;border:1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 95 / .7);border-radius:9999px;background:oklch(0.985 0.01 95 / .85);padding:4px;box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,.08);font-family:'IBM Plex Sans SC',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif}.ds-theme-toggle legend{position:absolute;width:1px;height:1px;overflow:hidden;clip:rect(0,0,0,0)}.ds-theme-toggle button{display:inline-flex;width:32px;height:32px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:9999px;background:transparent;color:oklch(0.45 0.03 70);font-size:14px;transition:background-color .2s ease-out,color .2s ease-out,box-shadow .2s ease-out}.ds-theme-toggle button:hover{background:oklch(0.965 0.01 95 / .7);color:oklch(0.18 0.02 70)}.ds-theme-toggle button[aria-pressed=true]{background:oklch(0.995 0.008 95);color:oklch(0.18 0.02 70);box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,.08);border-color:oklch(0.9 0.01 95 / .7)}.ds-theme-toggle button:focus-visible{outline:none;border-color:oklch(0.7 0.05 240);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px oklch(0.7 0.05 240 / .5)}

narrative.overview:
OctoRill should feel like a quiet desk where the user's own GitHub world has already been sorted into readable piles. The physical scene is a developer opening the dashboard during a morning review or late focus session, scanning release context under normal room light, and wanting confidence without ceremony.

The system is product-first: dense enough for repeated reading, warm enough for daily use, and disciplined enough to keep GitHub as the source of truth. Light mode uses paper-like warmth; dark mode is available for low-light reading, but it must not become a neon observability console.

It explicitly rejects the PRODUCT.md anti-references: a full GitHub clone, a generic AI news dashboard, a metrics-first admin console, and a noisy social feed.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper surfaces with restrained ink-first contrast.
Rounded product primitives, with larger radii only for landing and shell surfaces.
Sparse accent color, mostly reserved for focus, status, brand, and admin affordances.
Reading layouts that prefer stable grouping, sidebars, tabs, and accountable summaries.

rules.name: The Ink Leads Rule
rules.body: Primary actions use ink on paper. Do not replace core product actions with saturated category colors.

rules.name: The Rare Slate Rule
rules.body: Brand Slate is an identity accent. If it appears across a full screen as decoration, it is already overused.

rules.name: The Reading First Rule
rules.body: Body prose gets line height before decoration. If release text feels compressed, increase breathing room before adding color.

rules.name: The Mono Is Evidence Rule
rules.body: Use mono for factual identifiers, never for personality.

rules.name: The Flat By Default Rule
rules.body: Resting product surfaces rely on borders and tonal contrast. Shadows appear for state, focus, or floating layers.

dos: Do keep Warm Ink and Reading Paper as the dominant product contrast.
Do use Storybook states as the source for stable visual verification.
Do keep release content, translation, polished summaries, and original GitHub links close together.
Do use visible focus rings on every interactive primitive.
Do let admin observability surfaces be denser than the ordinary Dashboard, while preserving the same primitives.
donts: Don't make OctoRill look or behave like a full GitHub clone.
Don't turn it into a generic AI news dashboard.
Don't make the admin center a metrics-first admin console that dominates the product story.
Don't let the Dashboard become a noisy social feed.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders, gradient text, default glassmorphism, hero-metric templates, or endless identical card grids.
Don't bury original GitHub context or over-celebrate AI output.
